title: Diagram manifest
description: A self-describing, addressable SVG diagram manifest, embedded in a <metadata id="diagram-manifest"> element. Tool-neutral and experimental (pre-1.0): the schema may change without a version bump until declared stable. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields, so additional properties are permitted everywhere.

version.description: Schema version (major.minor). Consumers tolerate additive fields within a major version.

width.description: Canvas width; an overlay shares viewBox="0 0 width height".

match.description: How node.patterns are matched against a runtime string. Required only for matching (e.g. lighting up nodes from a running job).

target.description: Names the runtime string the patterns match against (e.g. "fqProcessName" for a Nextflow run).

groups.description: Optional multi-membership categories a node can belong to several of.

regions.description: Optional single-membership containers a node sits inside.

nodes.description: The addressable points on the diagram.

id.description: Join key; equals data-node-id on the element.

x.description: Centre x, absolute SVG user units.

y.description: Centre y, absolute SVG user units.

groups.description: Ids of groups this node belongs to.

region.description: Id of the region containing this node.

patterns.description: Regexes identifying this node against the match target.
